clinical_criteria: EHR history of 365+ days (365+ days between most recent and least recent visit)
Age at last visit: 741+ days old (approximately 2 years)
Cases: 2+ relevant ICD visits on different days after age 741 days
Cases: 1+ relevant medication OR 1+ relevant procedure after age 741 days
Controls: 2+ in-person visits of any kind at any age with one visit being at age 741+
Control exclusion: 2+ visits to Behavioral Health/Clinical Psychology department
algorithm_summary: This anxiety phenotype algorithm identifies cases as individuals with 2+ anxiety-related ICD codes on different days after age 741 days, plus at least 1 relevant medication or therapy. Cases must have 365+ days of EHR history and be 741+ days old at last visit, with absence of exclusion codes. Controls are excluded if they have any anxiety/comorbid disorder codes, relevant medications/procedures, genetic abnormalities, or 2+ behavioral health visits. The algorithm references multiple tables (Tables 1-8) containing specific ICD codes, medications, and procedures for case inclusion, case exclusion, control exclusion, and post-hoc covariates, but these codes are stored in separate files (anxiety_icd_mr.csv, anxiety_meds_mr.csv, anxiety_procs_mr.csv, Anxiety_tables.xlsx) not provided in this document.
